Operating Instructions
======================

This section describes the basic operation procedures of the |PRODUCT_NAME|.

Power On / Off
--------------

1. Press the power button to turn on the unit.
2. The LCD screen will light up and display system status.
3. Press the power button again to turn off the system.

AC Output
---------

1. Press the AC button to enable AC output.
2. The AC indicator will appear on the display.
3. Connect your device to the AC output ports.

USB Output
----------

USB ports provide direct DC output for compatible devices such as smartphones,
tablets and cameras.

DC Output
---------

The DC output ports can be used for powering compatible 12V devices.

.. note::

   Detailed interface diagrams and operating illustrations are provided in
   the visual pages of the final manual.
